message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 176 — MILESTONE storage write-path send_with_cx 46/46

RusticMaple: tick 169-176 sweep complete. All 46 storage _with_cx
write methods now route through WriteCommandSender::send_with_cx,
closing the root-level orphan cx at the base of every storage
write. Storage I/O end-to-end cx-interruptible under backpressure.
StorageHandle: 140/140 sibling coverage + 46/46 write send_with_cx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
